name: persistent-memory
description: Persistent agent memory system for iHhashi. Agents compound knowledge instead of resetting. Provides proactive context injection, cross-agent communication, and structured knowledge storage.
author: iHhashi

databases.knowledge: Semantic knowledge chunks with tags and source tracking
databases.crm: Contact and interaction tracking across channels
databases.social_analytics: Post performance and social media metrics
databases.agent_runs: Execution history for scheduled and ad-hoc jobs

commands.boot: Boot an agent with proactive context injection
commands.write: Write a memory entry for an agent
